title: MagicTech Ascendancy
description: A modpack meant for friends and small groups to play and have fun.
body:
A modpack I made for me and my friend group but I liked it enough to decide to post and put it out into the world.


This modpack is best enjoyed with a small group of friends and not a large server due to balance reasons.

 
This pack should work on servers I have successfully gotten it to run however I have not thoroughly tested it.


I do not plan on actively Maintaining this pack however if I will likely try to periodically fix any reported issues or ones I happen to find.

Report Issues on Curseforge page: https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/magictech-ascendancy/

Mods Fullbright & Hwyla & Thermal Dynamic & Buildcraft & Twilight Forest & Inventory Pets(By Purplicious_Cow_ ) are included, links below

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hwyla

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buildcraft

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fullbright

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-pets
